dialogues: Now watch this. Here's the SAME data as a bar graph.
This category has 40. The picture graph shows 4 symbols. The bar graph shows a bar up to 40. Both graphs show 50 for Birds. Can you find where?
That's it. Picture graphs use symbols. Bar graphs use bars. Both show 50.
That's it. Picture graphs use symbols. Bar graphs use bars. Both show 50.
Bar graphs are really useful with scale of 10. You read the HEIGHT instead of counting symbols.
